scripts.seed:local: npx tsx scripts/seed-demo.ts > /tmp/ia-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute inbox-angel --local  --file=/tmp/ia-seed.sql; rm -f /tmp/ia-seed.sql
scripts.seed:remote: npx tsx scripts/seed-demo.ts > /tmp/ia-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute inbox-angel --remote --file=/tmp/ia-seed.sql; rm -f /tmp/ia-seed.sql

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Runtime API token for Email Routing + DNS writes. **Not** the deploy token — create a separate one at [My Profile → API Tokens → Create Custom Token](https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens/create). Required permissions: Account Settings:Read, Email Sending:Edit, Zone / Email Routing Rules:Edit, DNS:Edit, Workers Routes:Edit.

CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID.description: Your Cloudflare Zone ID. Find it at [dash.cloudflare.com](https://dash.cloudflare.com) → click your domain → right sidebar → Zone ID.

REPORTS_DOMAIN.description: Subdomain for receiving DMARC reports and free-check emails (e.g. `reports.yourdomain.com`). Must be on the same Cloudflare zone.

FROM_EMAIL.description: Sender address for outbound alerts and digests (e.g. `noreply@reports.yourdomain.com`). Must be on the same Cloudflare zone.

CUSTOMER_DOMAIN.description: Your domain (e.g. `yourdomain.com`). Auto-provisions your account on first dashboard visit — no extra setup needed.

CUSTOMER_EMAIL.description: Your email address. Receives monitoring alerts and weekly DMARC digest emails.

CUSTOMER_NAME.description: Your org display name shown in the dashboard (e.g. `Acme Corp`).
